operations.summary: Get the amount of violating rules for the specified device.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The device ID for which to get violations.

responseMessages.message: The violation count was successfully retrieved

operations.summary: Get the violating rules for the specified device.
operations.notes: policyName is supported for management devices running in Advanced management mode.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The device ID for which to get violations

parameters.name: policyName
parameters.description: Return only violations that match this policy

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Return only violations of this severity

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Return only violations of this type

responseMessages.message: The specified value for the violation severity is invalid
The specified value for the violation type is invalid
You cannot specify a policyName because the device is not running in Advanced management mode
A device with the specified ID was not found
A policy with the specified policyName was not found for this device
